complaint: My laptop stopped working after 3 weeks. I need a replacement under warranty.
The keyboard keys are falling off and my device is only 2 months old. This should be covered.
My ThinkPad battery died completely after 6 weeks. Warranty should cover this.
The charging port broke on its own. I never dropped it. I want a warranty claim filed.
My screen has dead pixels straight out of the box. I need this replaced under warranty.
The hinge on my laptop cracked after normal use. Device is 3 months old and under warranty.
My laptop fan is making a loud grinding noise. I need it repaired immediately.
The trackpad stopped responding completely. I need a technician to look at this.
My screen flickers constantly and makes it impossible to work. Please send a repair kit.
The USB ports on my ThinkPad stopped working after a software update. Need repair.
My laptop overheats and shuts down every 30 minutes. Something is wrong with the cooling system.
The power button is stuck and I cannot turn my device on. Need urgent repair.
I want a full refund. This laptop has had 3 issues in the first month. Completely unacceptable.
I ordered a laptop 3 weeks ago and it arrived damaged. I want my money back immediately.
This device does not match what was advertised on your website. I want a refund now.
I have been waiting 2 months for a repair that never happened. I just want a refund at this point.
The laptop I received is a completely different model than what I ordered. Full refund please.
I returned my device 3 weeks ago and still have not received my refund. Where is my money?
My order was supposed to arrive 5 days ago and I have no tracking updates. Where is my package?
The laptop arrived with a completely crushed box. Looks like it was dropped multiple times.
I got someone else's order delivered to my address. My actual order is missing.
My package shows delivered but I never received it. I need this investigated immediately.
I paid for 2 day shipping 2 weeks ago and my order still has not shipped. This is ridiculous.
The laptop was delivered to the wrong address. I need this resolved today.
My laptop will not connect to WiFi even after reinstalling drivers. Nothing works.
My ThinkPad is stuck in a boot loop and will not load Windows. I need help now.
The Bluetooth on my device stopped working after the latest update. Please help.
My laptop screen goes black randomly while I am working. I have tried everything.
I cannot install any software on my device. It says insufficient storage but I have 400GB free.
My laptop runs extremely slow even after a fresh Windows install. Something is wrong.
